rule: A set is not exhausted while unresolved gaps remain or while source lanes remain unattempted. This ledger is audit-only and cannot authorize writes.

source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: Structured API finish claims are not master truth without human/checklist support.
Structured API finish claims are not master truth without human/checklist support.
Only explicit card-level variants become finish_presence evidence.
Current adapter does not emit finish truth.
Current adapter records rarity context but does not infer finish truth.
Only exact deck-list rows on pages that state Battle Academy cards have colored silhouettes/deck marks may support stamped finish truth.
PDF extraction is incomplete; failed extraction is not disagreement.
Must prove exact card + finish from product/checklist page, not search result existence.
SVE-only lane. Accepts only exact card number, card name, Scarlet & Violet Energies context, and reverse holo page/variant evidence.
SVE-only fallback lane. Accepts only exact product title plus reverse finish and collector number labels.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact SVE reverse product variant rows
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SVE-only fallback lane. Accepts only exact product identity plus explicit Reverse Holo variant metadata.
SVP-only lane. Accepts only exact Scarlet & Violet Black Star Promos identity plus explicit embedded variant/finish evidence.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact SVP World Championships Winner product page
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: Single exact SVP #225 lane. Accepts only product title/text matching Pikachu, #225, Pokemon Promo, and World Championships Winner.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Paldea Evolved stamped product/variant pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SV02-only lane. Accepts only exact Paldea Evolved identity plus explicit embedded stamp variant evidence.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Mega Evolution Play Pokemon stamped product/variant pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: ME01-only lane. Accepts only exact Mega Evolution identity plus explicit embedded Play Pokemon stamp variant evidence.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Rising Rivals card-level variant pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: PL2-only lane. Accepts only exact Rising Rivals identity plus explicit Holofoil or League Stamp variant evidence. League Stamp maps to stamped only for exact card-level source pages.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Prismatic Evolutions additional-card Professor Program Logo rows
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SV08.5-only lane. Accepts only exact Additional Cards rows naming Professor Program Logo. Generic Promotion markers and rarity icons are not finish truth.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Temporal Forces additional-card finish and stamp rows
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SV05-only lane. Accepts only exact Additional Cards rows naming Cosmos Holo or a specific stamp. Generic Promotion markers and rarity icons are not finish truth.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Brilliant Stars stamped product pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SWSH9-only lane. Accepts only exact product titles naming card number, card name, and Prize Pack League Promo or Pikachu Pumpkin Stamp. No set-wide inference is allowed.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Lost Origin Trick or Trade 2023 stamped release-info pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: SWSH11-only lane. Accepts only exact card release pages naming Lost Origin card number, card name, Mirage Holofoil, and Pikachu jack-o-lantern stamp. General Trick or Trade set membership is not enough.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: exact Black & White Play! Pokemon League Promo product pages
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: BW1-only lane. Accepts only exact product titles naming card number, card name, and Play! Pokemon League Promo. No set-wide league-promo inference is allowed.
Must prove exact card + finish from a specific item row.
Only exact variant labels may support finish truth.

source_catalog.source_url_template: source-specific set or product URL required
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: Marketplace rows must be exact and English scoped.

source_catalog.evidence_strength: physical-card existence support for hard gaps
source_catalog.source_url_template: PSA/CGC/BGS certification or population search URL required
source_catalog.finish_truth_limit: Useful for physical existence, not bulk finish inference.
Does not become master truth alone; must be paired with another independent source.
